name: Soulforge Aptitude
descriptionTemplate:
This talent is only effective in the {Astral Reign} stages.
This Awakener's CON, ATK, and DEF +[Arg1]%, and they gain [Arg2] Keyflare upon their first {Rouse}.
Ogier's Shield Generation +[Arg3]%, {STR} Generation +[Arg4]%, and each time his Exalt is played, his Shield Generation in this battle increases by an additional 1% of his DEF.
